orchestrator.description: Summary mode – Statewise/Club/Product analytics with 30-day deviation alerts

queries.name: statewise_club_counts
queries.description: State x Club member counts – Today vs 30-day average with deviation %
queries.query: WITH today_data AS ( SELECT state_code, club_id, COUNT(*) AS today_count FROM curated_db.membership WHERE load_date = CAST(current_date AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY state_code, club_id ), baseline AS ( SELECT state_code, club_id, ROUND(AVG(daily_count), 0) AS avg_30d FROM ( SELECT state_code, club_id, load_date, COUNT(*) AS daily_count FROM curated_db.membership WHERE load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -30, current_date) AS VARCHAR) AND load_date < CAST(current_date AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY state_code, club_id, load_date ) GROUP BY state_code, club_id ) SELECT t.state_code, t.club_id, t.today_count, COALESCE(b.avg_30d, 0) AS avg_30d_count, CASE WHEN b.avg_30d > 0 THEN ROUND((CAST(t.today_count AS DOUBLE) - b.avg_30d) / b.avg_30d * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS deviation_pct FROM today_data t LEFT JOIN baseline b ON t.state_code = b.state_code AND t.club_id = b.club_id ORDER BY ABS(CASE WHEN b.avg_30d > 0 THEN (CAST(t.today_count AS DOUBLE) - b.avg_30d) / b.avg_30d * 100 ELSE 0 END) DESC

chart.title: State x Club – Today vs 30-Day Avg

queries.name: club_bill_plans
queries.description: Bill plan breakdown for each club – plan types, member count, total amount
queries.query: SELECT m.club_id, m.bill_plan, COUNT(*) AS member_count, ROUND(SUM(m.bill_amount), 2) AS total_amount, ROUND(AVG(m.bill_amount), 2) AS avg_amount FROM curated_db.membership m WHERE m.load_date = CAST(current_date AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY m.club_id, m.bill_plan ORDER BY m.club_id, total_amount DESC

chart.title: Bill Plans by Club – Total Amount

queries.name: product_cost_by_state
queries.description: Product amount/cost by product and state – Today vs 30-day avg with deviation
queries.query: WITH today_data AS ( SELECT product_code, state_code, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS today_amount, COUNT(*) AS today_txn_count FROM curated_db.transactions WHERE load_date = CAST(current_date AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY product_code, state_code ), baseline AS ( SELECT product_code, state_code, ROUND(AVG(daily_amount), 2) AS avg_30d_amount, ROUND(AVG(daily_txn_count), 0) AS avg_30d_txn_count FROM ( SELECT product_code, state_code, load_date, SUM(amount) AS daily_amount, COUNT(*) AS daily_txn_count FROM curated_db.transactions WHERE load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -30, current_date) AS VARCHAR) AND load_date < CAST(current_date AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY product_code, state_code, load_date ) GROUP BY product_code, state_code ) SELECT t.product_code, t.state_code, t.today_amount, t.today_txn_count, COALESCE(b.avg_30d_amount, 0) AS avg_30d_amount, COALESCE(b.avg_30d_txn_count, 0) AS avg_30d_txn_count, CASE WHEN b.avg_30d_amount > 0 THEN ROUND((t.today_amount - b.avg_30d_amount) / b.avg_30d_amount * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS amount_deviation_pct, CASE WHEN b.avg_30d_txn_count > 0 THEN ROUND((CAST(t.today_txn_count AS DOUBLE) - b.avg_30d_txn_count) / b.avg_30d_txn_count * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS txn_deviation_pct FROM today_data t LEFT JOIN baseline b ON t.product_code = b.product_code AND t.state_code = b.state_code ORDER BY ABS(CASE WHEN b.avg_30d_amount > 0 THEN (t.today_amount - b.avg_30d_amount) / b.avg_30d_amount * 100 ELSE 0 END) DESC

chart.title: Product Cost by State – Today vs 30-Day Avg

queries.name: product_cost_overall
queries.description: Product cost summary across all states – Today vs 30-day trend
queries.query: WITH today_data AS ( SELECT product_code, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS today_amount, COUNT(*) AS today_txn_count, COUNT(DISTINCT state_code) AS states_active FROM curated_db.transactions WHERE load_date = CAST(current_date AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY product_code ), baseline AS ( SELECT product_code, ROUND(AVG(daily_amount), 2) AS avg_30d_amount FROM ( SELECT product_code, load_date, SUM(amount) AS daily_amount FROM curated_db.transactions WHERE load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -30, current_date) AS VARCHAR) AND load_date < CAST(current_date AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY product_code, load_date ) GROUP BY product_code ) SELECT t.product_code, t.today_amount, t.today_txn_count, t.states_active, COALESCE(b.avg_30d_amount, 0) AS avg_30d_amount, CASE WHEN b.avg_30d_amount > 0 THEN ROUND((t.today_amount - b.avg_30d_amount) / b.avg_30d_amount * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END AS deviation_pct FROM today_data t LEFT JOIN baseline b ON t.product_code = b.product_code ORDER BY t.today_amount DESC

queries.name: daily_trend_30d
queries.description: 30-day daily trend – total count and amount across all products/states
queries.query: SELECT load_date, COUNT(*) AS total_records, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount, COUNT(DISTINCT state_code) AS active_states, COUNT(DISTINCT club_id) AS active_clubs FROM curated_db.transactions WHERE load_date >= CAST(date_add('day', -30, current_date) AS VARCHAR) GROUP BY load_date ORDER BY load_date

_notes.deviation_alerts: Rows where deviation_pct > 20% are flagged RED in the email. This requires code enhancement to etl_orchestrator.py (not yet implemented).
_notes.gifs: Two decorative GIFs are embedded in the email: dashboard-analytics and alert-pulse. These require code enhancement to support CID attachments.
_notes.table_names: Replace curated_db.membership and curated_db.transactions with your actual table/column names.
